title: Hunga papuana
taxonomy: Hunga papuana is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, including Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands. The plant is classified under the genus Hunga. The classification is further divided into the subgenus Hunga and the species H. papuana.
uses: Hunga papuana is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands, with limited information available on its medicinal uses.
